source.reference: ACE3 ballistics:  ACE3: caliber=7.823mm, mass=9.4608g, drag=7, BC=[0.2]. Velocities: 700.0m/s@254.0mm, 800.0m/s@406.4mm, 820.0m/s@508.0mm, 833.0m/s@609.6mm, 845.0m/s@660.4mm
source.methodology: Values sourced from ACE3 Advanced Ballistics configuration data. ACE3 sources its data from a mix of IRL references, manufacturer data, and community estimates.
